privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.welcome: Welcome to Dulce Manía's privacy policy. Your privacy is important to us.

info.title: Information We Collect
info.p1: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and mailing address when you register or place an order.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.p1: We use the information we collect to process your orders, communicate with you, and improve our services.

sharing.title: How We Share Your Information
sharing.p1: We do not share your personal information with third parties, except when necessary to complete your order (for example, with our shipping partners).
